name: TrustBadgeBar
usage_hint: Horizontal row of trust/service badges (free shipping, returns, secure checkout) placed below hero, above fold, or near BuyBox.
when_to_use: To quickly communicate key service promises and reduce purchase friction. Use when you have 3-6 trust signals that apply to all products (site-wide guarantees, not product-specific features).
when_not_to_use: For product-specific details like ingredients or certifications (use PDPInfoCards instead). Don't use if you only have 1-2 badges (looks sparse; integrate into BuyBox copy instead). Avoid on checkout pages where trust is already established.
anti_patterns: Using more than 6 badges (dilutes message; pick top 4-5 most impactful guarantees)
Mixing service promises with product features (e.g. "Free Shipping" + "Organic Ingredients" — separate concerns: TrustBadgeBar for service, PDPInfoCards for product)
Custom icon names that don't exist in the icon library (causes missing icons; verify icon names from Icon component docs)
Using default variant with very long label text (wraps awkwardly; use compact variant or shorten labels to 2-4 words)

examples.label: Default badge bar with 4 service guarantees (below hero)
Inline minimal variant for BuyBox integration
Full badge bar with sublabels (header or above fold)
